Bush will not be supported by many Arab nations openly. Many will support covertly
though. There will be mass-protests against American policies in the Arab world, and
Bush will use the rebels of Saddam regime to overthrow him! War will commence
within the next four months. America will undergo an emotional turmoil due to
external forces. This will probably be sowing the seeds of cyclic conflicts and
problems.
War will stop, UN to take over soon! - (posted 1st week of April, 2003)
Tuesday, 13 May , 2003, 00:00
The US war on Iraq will be short lived and come to an end on or around April 16,
2003. The US will be marching ahead with fierce resistance from the Iraqis. The
operation won’t be as easy as the US had anticipated. The US will be steering ahead
and take on most of the Iraqi cities amidst deep resistance.
*Lot of oil wells will also be put to fire.
*150-200 people will die from the coalition forces.
